name: @michaelfromyeg/fantasy-sports-toolkit
description: Sport-agnostic fantasy agent tooling for every coding-agent harness, authored as a Weft marketplace. Provider-agnostic skills (set-lineup, waiver-wire, trade-analyzer) for football/basketball/baseball/hockey, plus a Sleeper data-provider plugin. Consume with: weft install npm:@michaelfromyeg/fantasy-sports-toolkit
author: michaelfromyeg
